recommendations.title: Gangs of Wasseypur - Part 1
recommendations.overview: In 1970s India, Sardar Khan vows to take revenge on the man who killed his father decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Ugly
recommendations.overview: When a 10-year old girl goes missing, her stepfather races against time to investigate the kidnapping. Can he find her before it's too late?

recommendations.title: Raman Raghav 2.0
recommendations.overview: A corrupt cop and a serial killer obsessed with a psychopath from the '60s get caught up in a ruthless cat-and-mouse game.

recommendations.title: Dev.D
recommendations.overview: The son of a wealthy businessman finds solace in drugs and alcohol when he breaks up with his childhood love.

recommendations.title: Lust Stories
recommendations.overview: An anthology of four stories that sheds light on modern relationships from the viewpoint of the Indian woman.
recommendations.director: Karan Johar, Zoya Akhtar, Anurag Kashyap, Dibakar Banerjee

recommendations.title: Furious 7
recommendations.overview: Deckard Shaw seeks revenge against Dominic Toretto and his family for his comatose brother.

recommendations.title: Sholay
recommendations.overview: After his family is slain by the notorious bandit Gabbar Singh, former Inspector Thakur Baldev Singh enlists low-level outlaws Jai and Veeru to capture Gabbar and seek revenge.

recommendations.title: To Live and Die in L.A.
recommendations.overview: When his longtime partner on the force is killed, reckless U.S. Secret Service agent Richard Chance vows revenge, setting out to nab dangerous counterfeit artist Eric Masters.

recommendations.title: Sweet Girl
recommendations.overview: A man vows to bring justice to those responsible for his wife's death while protecting the only family he has left, his daughter.

recommendations.title: Dead Man's Shoes
recommendations.overview: A soldier returns to his small town and exacts a deadly revenge on the thugs who tormented his disabled brother while he was away.
